registry.description: Whoredom is the biblical vocabulary for unfaithfulness in the covenant — specifically the turning of devotion and service away from God toward other gods or other sources of security. The Hebrew root (zanah, fornication) is used metaphorically throughout the prophets to describe Israel's idolatry: the nation that was betrothed to God has pursued other lovers. The metaphor is chosen deliberately to capture the relational betrayal involved in idolatry — it is not merely rule-breaking but the breaking of a bond of love and fidelity.

terms.medium_def:
1) to commit fornication, be a harlot, play the harlot
1a) (Qal)
1a1) to be a harlot, act as a harlot, commit fornication
1a2) to commit adultery
1a3) to be a cult prostitute
1a4) to be unfaithful (to God) (fig.)
1b) (Pual) to play the harlot
1c) (Hiphil)
1c1) to cause to commit adultery
1c2) to force into prostitution
1c3) to commit fornication

verses.esv_text: Mic 1:7 All her carved images shall be beaten to pieces, all her wages shall be burned with fire , and all her idols I will lay waste , for from the fee of a prostitute she gathered them, and to the fee of a prostitute they shall return .

verses.esv_text: Eze 16:15 “But you trusted in your beauty and played the whore because of your renown and lavished your whorings on any passerby ; your beauty became his .
verses.preview_html: Eze 16:15 “But you trusted in your beauty and played the whore because of your renown and lavished your whorings on any passerby; your beauty became his.

verses.esv_text: Eze 16:20 And you took your sons and your daughters , whom you had borne to me, and these you sacrificed to them to be devoured . Were your whorings so small a matter
verses.preview_html: Eze 16:20 And you took your sons and your daughters, whom you had borne to me, and these you sacrificed to them to be devoured. Were your whorings so small a matter

verses.esv_text: Eze 16:22 And in all your abominations and your whorings you did not remember the days of your youth , when you were naked and bare , wallowing in your blood .

verses.esv_text: Eze 16:33 Men give gifts to all prostitutes , but you gave your gifts to all your lovers , bribing them to come to you from every side with your whorings .
verses.preview_html: Eze 16:33 Men give gifts to all prostitutes, but you gave your gifts to all your lovers, bribing them to come to you from every side with your whorings.

verses.esv_text: Eze 16:34 So you were different from other women in your whorings . No one solicited you to play the whore , and you gave payment , while no payment was given to you; therefore you were different .

verses.esv_text: Jer 3:2 Lift up your eyes to the bare heights , and see ! Where have you not been ravished ? By the waysides you have sat awaiting lovers like an Arab in the wilderness . You have polluted the land with your vile whoredom .
